creator: leif@neland.dk
text:
"libusb-config... 
/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/usr/games:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/root/bin
configure: error: *** libusb-config not found. You need a working libusb
installation. Version >=0.1.7"

libusb-config is in  /usr/ports/devel/libusb/ which can not be 
installed, because
"===>  libusb-0.1.12_4 has been already included into base system."

However, it appears the include is not complete, when libusb-config is 
missing.
'
Is a "libusb-devel" port needed, or should libusb-config be added to base?

Leif
